common.error_generic: Something went wrong, please try again

points.title: Points
points.subtitle: Quick add/deduct points per class or per student. Click a reason chip to apply its default.
points.classroom_subtitle: Per-student point adjustments. Click a reason chip and fine-tune the amount before confirming.
points.no_reasons: You haven't set up any point reasons yet.

toast.reset_done: Reset done — a reverse record was written
toast.reset_skipped_zero: Student is already at 0; nothing to reset

points.reset_confirm_student: A reverse record will be added for {{label}} (currently {{current}}), bringing this semester's points to 0. History is preserved.
points.reset_confirm_class: A reverse record will be added for each of the {{count}} students, bringing this semester's points to 0. History is preserved.

admin_reasons.title: Point reasons
admin_reasons.subtitle: Manage reasons like "asked a good question" with default point amounts. Positive = reward, negative = deduction.
admin_reasons.empty: No reasons yet. Click 「Add reason」 to start.
admin_reasons.hint: Hit 「Save」 to commit. Drag rows to reorder.
admin_reasons.invalid_hint: Every reason needs a name (max 50 chars).
admin_reasons.system_hint: 「達成標準」 (Meeting Standard) is written automatically when a student's score meets the per-subject standard you set. The per-subject bonus amount is configured under Subjects. This reason cannot be renamed or deleted.

semester.label: Viewing
semester.viewing_archived: Viewing a past semester — read-only. Change which semester is current via Semesters admin.

item_name_combobox.no_existing: No existing items yet — typing a name will create a new one

admin_items.title: Exam items
admin_items.subtitle: Each item (exam / quiz / assignment) belongs to one classroom. Items with the same name and category can live independently in different classrooms.
admin_items.empty: No items yet. Click "New item" to start.

modal.subject: Subject
modal.name: Name
modal.name_placeholder: Search existing items or type a new name…
modal.name_hint: Prefer reusing names already used in other classes so the same exam can be compared later; only create new if nothing matches.

delete.title: Delete item
delete.warning: This will also delete {{grades}} grade(s) and {{points}} point record(s). This cannot be undone.

item.duplicate_name: An item with this name already exists for this subject + category + semester

classroom_item.has_scores: Some students still have scores > 0 for this item. Clear (zero-out / delete) all scores first before hiding the column.

admin_semesters.title: Semesters
admin_semesters.subtitle: Configure how many terms make up an academic year, and add / switch the current semester. Other pages (grade entry, dashboards) default to filtering by the current semester.
admin_semesters.terms_per_year_hint: Taiwan default is 2 (上 / 下). 3 = 4 months each; 4 = 3 months each.
admin_semesters.empty: No semesters yet. Click "Add semester" to start.
admin_semesters.bad_date_range: Start date cannot be after end date
admin_semesters.date_mismatch: The entered dates do not match the academic year / term
admin_semesters.computed_range_invalid: Enter a valid academic year and term first
admin_semesters.duplicate_slot: This academic year / term already exists

admin_subjects.title: Subject weights
admin_subjects.subtitle: Each subject can have its own category-weight mix and per-subject reward-points amount awarded when a student meets the standard on a major exam or quiz.
admin_subjects.formula_hint: Bonus is added on top of the weighted total (capped at 100). Reward points = how many points to award when a student meets the standard on a major exam or quiz.
admin_subjects.confirm_delete: Delete subject "{{name}}"? This will also remove all exams and grades under it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, UI, semester, integrations, and data management.

ui.heading: Interface
ui.language_hint: Applies immediately; the choice is stored in this browser.

semester.heading: Semester
semester.terms_per_year_hint: New semesters created after this change use the new split; existing ones stay as-is.

danger.heading: Danger zone
danger.warning: Resetting your account wipes all data and re-seeds defaults. This cannot be undone.

bullets.weights: Subject weights / point rules (reset to defaults)

home.intro: Grades is a grade + reward-points system for teachers. Build classes, record exam and quiz scores, and let students earn points when they hit their standard.

workflow.heading: Suggested workflow
workflow.step2: Under each subject, add exams or assignments (midterm, quiz, homework…)
workflow.step3: Enter scores; the system auto-awards points when a student meets their standard

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Manage your class rosters — students and grades hang off these.

empty.heading: No classes yet
empty.subheading: Pick one of the options below to start building your roster

cta.add_manual_hint: Just enter a name to get started

actions.confirm_delete: Delete "{{name}}"? This will also remove its students and grades.

errors.duplicate_name: A class with this name already exists

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Manage this class's roster, seat numbers, and per-category standards.
students.confirm_delete: Delete student at seat {{seat}}? This cannot be undone.

empty.heading: No students yet
empty.subheading: Use the Excel batch import, or add students one at a time.

import.title: Batch import students
import.intro: Upload an .xlsx file — preview first, then confirm. Three columns: seat number (required), name (optional), email (optional). Grade import will be a separate file/flow.

errors.duplicate_seat: Seat number already exists in this class

grade_entry.title: Enter scores
grade_entry.subtitle: Scores save automatically when you leave a cell (Tab / Enter). Students who meet their standard get points awarded; lowering the score back below the threshold revokes them.
grade_entry.remove_column: Hide column (does not delete the item)
grade_entry.empty_no_item: No items selected. Click "New item" to start.
grade_entry.empty_no_students: This class has no students. Add students first.

modal.pick_subtitle: Pick the item you want to enter scores for; Save takes you to this class's grades page with that column ready to edit.

student_detail.title: Student transcript
student_detail.no_grades: No grades for this semester yet.
student_detail.no_points: No points for this semester yet.
student_detail.no_points_filtered: No records match the current filter.

standards.hint: Per-student standard score per subject. Leave a cell to save automatically; clear it to remove the threshold (no auto-award for that subject).
standards.formula_hint: Standard score = major-exam / quiz score must be ≥ this value to trigger auto-award for that student × subject. Subjects with no threshold never auto-award.

grades.title: Grades overview
grades.deactivate_tooltip: Hide this item from this class
grades.deactivate_blocked_tooltip: Some students still have scores > 0 for this item. Clear (zero-out / delete) all scores via online entry first to enable hide.
grades.deactivate_confirm: Hide 「{{name}}」 from this class? The column will no longer appear here.
grades.archive_confirm: Archive all currently-active items for this class into the snapshot store? This cannot be undone.
grades.archive_empty_tooltip: Nothing to archive — no items are active for this class right now.
grades.subtitle: Per-subject weighted totals by category weight, computed live.
grades.formula_hint: Weighting: categories with no grades are excluded and the remaining weights are re-normalised. Extra bonus is added on top (capped at 100).
grades.empty: No grade data for this semester yet. Use 「Import grades」 on the class page to upload a file.

import.title: Batch import grades
import.intro: Upload an .xlsx file. Column A is the seat number; each column from B onward is one exam (category / date / name). In the preview, pick a subject per column — students must already exist in this class roster.
import.subject_missing_hint: Pick a subject for every column before importing

import.unreadable: Excel file could not be parsed
import.bad_header: Excel header row is missing required columns
import.has_errors: Preview contains errors; fix them before importing
import.no_current_semester: No current semester is set — configure it before importing grades
import.subject_required_for_commit: Pick a subject for every column before importing
import.category_not_seeded: This category isn't seeded for your account yet — visit 「Category weights」 to initialize

semester.delete_current: Cannot delete the current semester. Set another as current first.
semester.delete_has_items: This semester has tests/grades and cannot be deleted. Move them to another semester first.
semester.bad_date_range: Start date cannot be after end date
semester.date_mismatch: The entered dates do not match the academic year / term
semester.archived: This semester is archived and read-only

archived_banner.body: This semester is archived — view only. Switch to the current semester via the top-right picker to edit.
archived_banner.body_with_label: {{label}} is archived — view only. Switch to the current semester via the top-right picker to edit.

snapshots.title: Archived grades
snapshots.subtitle: Snapshots of past-archived class grade bundles. Open any to browse, add items, edit scores — none of it affects the live classroom page.
snapshots.empty: No archives yet. From a class's grades page, hit 「Archive grades」 in the top right.
